mapper.select:
SELECT s.id as storeId, s.name as storeName, COUNT(o.id) as orderCount, COALESCE(SUM(o.total_amount), 0) as totalRevenue, COUNT(DISTINCT o.user_id) as customerCount FROM bls_store s LEFT JOIN `bls_order` o ON s.id = o.store_id AND DATE(o.create_time) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND o.status = 'COMPLETED' WHERE s.is_delete = 0
AND s.id IN
#{storeId}
GROUP BY s.id, s.name ORDER BY totalRevenue DESC

SELECT pr.id as ruleId, pr.name as ruleName, COUNT(o.id) as orderCount, COALESCE(SUM(o.total_amount), 0) as totalRevenue, COUNT(DISTINCT o.user_id) as customerCount FROM bls_price_rule pr LEFT JOIN `bls_order` o ON pr.id = o.price_rule_id AND DATE(o.create_time) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND o.status = 'COMPLETED' WHERE pr.is_delete = 0
AND pr.store_id IN
#{storeId}
GROUP BY pr.id, pr.name ORDER BY totalRevenue DESC
